title: Thai Broad Bean and British Pie Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful Thai-inspired stew featuring broad beans, British pie crust, and a hint of flaky pastry, all infused with the spices and aromas of Thailand.
instructions: 2. Cook the broad beans according to package instructions.
3. In a large skillet, heat coconut oil over medium heat.
4. Add the onion and garlic, cooking until softened.
5. Add the cooked broad beans, fish sauce (if using), and crumbled pie crust.
6. Stir until the pie crust is well coated.
7. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with crumbled flaky pastry.
8. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
